column4: Tallerico et al. Sections III and III-D; 16 AWG heavy-build MW-16C polyimide-insulated magnet wire per NEMA MW 1000-2003; twisted pairs prepared per ASTM D2307-2013
column5: The paper describes the thermal class as an estimate of the temperature at which insulation is expected to have 20000 h life in air and later states that this wire insulation is rated for 20000 h operational life at 240 degC per ASTM D2307. The two numbers are retained as one cross-bound classification basis, not an Arrhenius law or direct lifetime guarantee. Vendor, lot, spool for most groups, qualification report, raw classification data, humidity, pressure, measurement uncertainty, and confidence metadata are absent. The 250 degC group used the same wire type and vendor but a different unspecified spool
